system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting professional ethical principles from engineering-ethics cases using the ProEthica nine-component formalism and the professional-ethics literature (McLaren extensional definition; Frankel aspirational principles; Taddeo constitutional interpretation). Follow the extraction methodology, matching rules, and output format given in the user message exactly, and return only the requested JSON (no prose, markdown, or code fences).

label.description: Principle class name (canonical short reusable leaf form)

principle_category.description: Controlled principle kind that drives the subClassOf typing when a new leaf is minted: fundamental_ethical, professional_virtue, relational, domain_specific. A routing input, not stored as a literal

extensional_examples.description: Optional class-mint field: prior cases that instantiate the principle (McLaren extensional grounding)

matched_uri.description: URI of matched class (null if new)

matched_label.description: Label of matched class (null if new)

new_principle_classes.description: Principle classes extracted from case text (CandidatePrincipleClass)

identifier.description: Unique instance descriptor (e.g. 'Public Safety in Bridge Review')

principle_class.description: Label of the principle class this individual instantiates

interpretation.description: Per-case reading of what the principle requires here (a defeasibility-pipeline source field)

concrete_expression.description: How the principle is concretely expressed in the case (a defeasibility-pipeline source field)

applied_to.description: The situation or party the principle bears on in the case

balancing_with.description: The competing principle or value the principle is balanced against (a defeasibility-pipeline source field)

tension_resolution.description: How the case resolves the tension involving this principle (a defeasibility-pipeline source field)

invoked_by.description: Actor(s) who invoke the principle; resolves to the invokedBy edge (P->Agent), not stored as a literal

principle_individuals.description: Specific principle invocations in the case (PrincipleIndividual)

existing_principles_text.description: Formatted list of existing principle classes from ontology (plus the reuse-bias guidance block)

cross_concept_context.description: Roles already extracted in this case, injected so invoked_by grounds in a named role-bearer (R->P dependency)

principle_schema.source: OntServe SHACL shapes (validation/shapes/core-shapes.ttl) PrincipleDefinitionShape via concept_ontology_slots -> _component_schema_block('Principle')
principle_schema.description: Principle definitional/individual field schema, resolved live from the SHACL PrincipleDefinitionShape (single source shared with the OntServe Principle entity page). principle_category drives the four-kind subClassOf typing; the canonical leaf becomes the rdf:type; invoked_by resolves to the invokedBy edge; the five narrative fields are per-individual literals

pass_directive.description: Per-pass directive; one body serves facts+discussion, differing only by this runtime slot

facts.name: Principles (facts)
facts.description: Extract new principle classes and principle individuals from the case facts (the values in play as the situation unfolds)

discussion.name: Principles (discussion)
discussion.description: Extract new principle classes and principle individuals from the case discussion, reusing the facts-pass principles via match_decision
